cases.notes: Electron startup smoke passed on Windows.
Installed and forced-missing dependency scenarios passed.
End-to-end MP4 download completed.
End-to-end MP3 download completed.
Known invalid URLs were rejected.
MM:SS and HH:MM:SS parsing checks passed.
Trimmed audio and video outputs matched expected segment duration.
Malformed and invalid trim ranges were blocked.
Playlist expansion and queue progression passed.
Pause, resume, and cancel controls passed on an active download.
Queue state transitions remained healthy after verification flows.
Embedded title, artist, year, and cover art were verified on MP3 output.
Fallback metadata derivation for uploader and upload date passed.
Approved custom audio/video paths routed correctly and unapproved paths were rejected.
Unsafe URL, timecode, queue-id, and settings-picker payloads were rejected.
Explicit confirmation, safe argument passing, and duplicate-update blocking passed.
Renderer retained the single-window top-stage and bottom-queue layout.
Portable packaged executable launched and exited cleanly with SMOKE_TEST=1.
NSIS installer completed silently to a temp directory and the installed app launched cleanly with SMOKE_TEST=1.
win-unpacked/resources contained the bundled python and config directories required by the packaged app.
